identity/api/v1/create-group.title: Create a new group
identity/api/v1/create-group.description: This call returns a paginated result of all groups.

identity/api/v1/create-group-user.title: Add member
identity/api/v1/create-group-user.description: Add a new user to the group.

identity/api/v1/delete-group.title: Deletes a group
identity/api/v1/delete-group.description: Delete a group with the given identifier

identity/api/v1/delete-group-user.title: Remove member
identity/api/v1/delete-group-user.description: Remove a user account from the group

identity/api/v1/eurofurence-identity.title: Eurofurence Identity
identity/api/v1/eurofurence-identity.description: This is the official API Documentation for the Eurofurence Identity service. This can be used to query or automated different things within the Identity service.

identity/api/v1/get-group.title: Get single group
identity/api/v1/get-group.description: This call returns a single group with optional user membership data.

identity/api/v1/get-group-users.title: List members
identity/api/v1/get-group-users.description: Show members of the groups. Email addresses are only visible with the `view_full_staff_details` scope/permission.

identity/api/v1/get-groups.title: Get all groups
identity/api/v1/get-groups.description: This call returns a paginated result of all groups.

identity/api/v1/introspect-token.title: Introspect Token
identity/api/v1/introspect-token.description: The introspection endpoint allows to check if a token (both refresh and access) is active or not. An active token is neither expired nor revoked.

identity/api/v1/patch-group.title: Update single group
identity/api/v1/patch-group.description: This call updates a single group.

identity/api/v1/put-group.title: Update single group
identity/api/v1/put-group.description: This call updates a single group.

identity/api/v2/add-group-member.title: Add member
identity/api/v2/add-group-member.description: Add a user to a group by email or user ID.

identity/api/v2/authorize-user.title: Authorization Endpoint
identity/api/v2/authorize-user.description: The OAuth 2.0 authorization endpoint. Initiates the authorization code flow by redirecting the user to the login and consent screens.

identity/api/v2/eurofurence-identity.title: Eurofurence Identity
identity/api/v2/eurofurence-identity.description: API v2 endpoints for the Eurofurence Identity service.

identity/api/v2/get-conventions.title: List conventions
identity/api/v2/get-conventions.description: Returns a list of all Eurofurence conventions ordered by year (ascending).

identity/api/v2/get-current-convention.title: Get current convention
identity/api/v2/get-current-convention.description: Returns the next upcoming or currently running convention

identity/api/v2/get-group-members.title: List group members
identity/api/v2/get-group-members.description: Returns a paginated list of group members with their roles and titles.

identity/api/v2/get-group-tree.title: Get group hierarchy tree
identity/api/v2/get-group-tree.description: Returns the full organizational hierarchy as a nested tree structure.

identity/api/v2/get-groups.title: List groups
identity/api/v2/get-groups.description: Returns a paginated list of groups.

identity/api/v2/get-jwks.title: JSON Web Key Set
identity/api/v2/get-jwks.description: Returns the public keys used to verify ID tokens and other signed JWTs issued by the authorization server.

identity/api/v2/get-metadata.title: List all metadata
identity/api/v2/get-metadata.description: Returns all key-value pairs stored by the authenticated app for the current user.

identity/api/v2/get-metadata-key.title: Get metadata value
identity/api/v2/get-metadata-key.description: Returns a single metadata value by key.

identity/api/v2/get-open-id-configuratio.title: OpenID Connect Discovery
identity/api/v2/get-open-id-configuratio.description: Returns the OpenID Connect discovery document containing metadata about the authorization server,

identity/api/v2/get-staff-list.title: List all staff members
identity/api/v2/get-staff-list.description: Returns a paginated list of all staff members.

identity/api/v2/get-staff-me.title: Get own staff profile
identity/api/v2/get-staff-me.description: Returns the authenticated user's full staff profile including all PII fields.

identity/api/v2/get-staff-member.title: Get staff member
identity/api/v2/get-staff-member.description: Returns a single staff member's profile.

identity/api/v2/get-token.title: Token Endpoint
identity/api/v2/get-token.description: Exchange an authorization code for access and refresh tokens, or refresh an existing token.

identity/api/v2/get-userinfo.title: Get userinfo
identity/api/v2/get-userinfo.description: Returns identity claims for the authenticated user based on granted scopes.

identity/api/v2/introspect-token.title: Introspect token
identity/api/v2/introspect-token.description: Check if an access or refresh token is active. Returns token metadata if active.

identity/api/v2/put-metadata-key.title: Create or update metadata
identity/api/v2/put-metadata-key.description: Creates or updates a metadata key-value pair. Returns 201 on create, 200 on update.

identity/api/v2/remove-group-member.title: Remove member
identity/api/v2/remove-group-member.description: Remove a user from a group.

identity/api/v2/schemas/groupsummary.title: GroupSummary
identity/api/v2/schemas/groupsummary.description: Nested group (parent or child) without recursive relations

identity/api/v2/schemas/grouptreenode.title: GroupTreeNode
identity/api/v2/schemas/grouptreenode.description: Recursive tree node representing a group in the hierarchy

identity/api/v2/schemas/staffprofile.title: StaffProfile
identity/api/v2/schemas/staffprofile.description: Staff member profile. PII fields may be absent based on the viewer's relationship to the staff member.

identity/api/v2/send-notification.title: Send a notification
identity/api/v2/send-notification.description: Dispatch a notification to a single user. The type must be registered under your app. Channel delivery is resolved based on the user's notification preferences, with transactional types always delivered via their default channels regardless of user preferences.

identity/api/v2/update-group-member.title: Update member
identity/api/v2/update-group-member.description: Update a member's level or title within a group.

identity/concepts/audiences.title: Audiences
identity/concepts/audiences.description: Audiences control where a token can be used. While scopes define what an app can do, audiences define which service should accept the token. This prevents a token meant for one service from being replayed against another.

identity/concepts/groups.title: Groups
identity/concepts/groups.description: Groups are how Eurofurence's identity service models organisational structure and access control beyond the individual user. Every staff member belongs to one or more groups, and those memberships drive everything from which Slack channels they end up in, to which internal tools they can use, to which API scopes their app tokens can assert.

identity/concepts/oauth-oidc-primer.title: OAuth2 & OpenID Connect Primer
identity/concepts/oauth-oidc-primer.description: Read this first if terms like "access token", "authorization code", or "client credentials" don't mean anything to you yet. This page is a plain-language tour of the two protocols Eurofurence Identity speaks, and a pointer to the right integration guide for your use case.

identity/concepts/scopes.title: Scopes
identity/concepts/scopes.description: Scopes control what data and APIs your application can access on behalf of a user. When a user authorizes your app, they see which scopes you're requesting and can decide whether to grant access.

identity/concepts/tokens.title: Understanding Tokens
identity/concepts/tokens.description: After a successful login, Eurofurence Identity hands your application up to three different tokens. They look similar but serve very different purposes, and mixing them up is one of the most common sources of bugs and security issues. This page explains what each token is for, who is supposed to verify it, and how to use it correctly.

identity/index.title: Introduction
identity/index.description: Eurofurence Identity is the central authentication and authorization service for the Eurofurence ecosystem. It allows users to sign in once and access all connected Eurofurence applications, from event registration to community tools, with a single account.

identity/integration/app-to-app.title: App-to-App APIs
identity/integration/app-to-app.description: Eurofurence services need to talk to each other. The registration system might need to check group memberships via Identity, or the Dealer's Den might need to verify a registration status. This guide explains how service-to-service communication is secured.

identity/integration/build-an-applicatio.title: Build an Application
identity/integration/build-an-applicatio.description: This guide explains how to integrate your application with Eurofurence Identity for authentication and authorization.

identity/integration/getting-started.title: Getting Started
identity/integration/getting-started.description: This guide walks you through the basics of integrating with Eurofurence Identity, from understanding how authentication works to making your first API call.

identity/platform-services/conventions.title: Conventions API
identity/platform-services/conventions.description: Eurofurence Identity exposes the current and historical conventions as a first-class resource. Use this service when your app needs to know which convention is "live" right now, or when it needs to reason about attendance across years.

identity/platform-services/metadata.title: User Metadata
identity/platform-services/metadata.description: The User Metadata API is a small key/value store attached to each user, scoped to the calling OAuth client. Reach for it when you need to persist lightweight per-user state — UI preferences, onboarding flags, last-used settings — without standing up a database of your own.

identity/platform-services/notification-.title: Notification Service
identity/platform-services/notification-.description: The Eurofurence Identity service provides a centralized notification system that first-party OAuth apps can use to send notifications to users through email, Telegram, and the in-app notification bell.
